originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Eliminating Templates and Dispatch Macros in PufferLib Backend
summary: Worked on removing C++ templates and dispatch macros from PufferLib's CUDA backend by compiling only one dtype at a time, simplifying the codebase. Deleted approximately 3,500 lines, reduced backend to under 5,000 lines, and moved modules from C++ to .cu files.
